DJI_0227-1.jpg.alt: Aerial photograph of a freshly installed Brava Composite Slate Roof by Roof Rite Exteriors. The house is an afluent, two-story, brick house with a path leading to the entrance and a clean manicured lawn.

DJI_0228-1.jpg.alt: Aerial photograph of a freshly installed Brava Composite Slate Roof by Roof Rite Exteriors. The house is an afluent, two-story, brick house with a path leading to the entrance and a clean manicured lawn.

DJI_0527.jpg.alt: A photograph of a new Eco-Star Composite Shake Roof being installed by Roof Rite in the late fall. A worker carries a board across the ridge of the roof as another worker fastens roof tiles to the synthetic felted deck.

IMG_3028.png.alt: Bundled DaVinci Synthetic Roof tiles are staged for installation in the driveway of a brickhouse with a brown garage door.

IMG_3029.png.alt: A ground photograph of Roof Rite Crews installing a DaVinci Single-Width Roof Tile in Composite Slate on a steep roof. The house is an impressive, two-story, brick dwelling with prevalent roof peaks, clean vintage windows and glass pediments, surrounded by a meticulously kept lawn and bushes.

IMG_3657.jpeg.alt: A Roof Rite truck is parked in front of a one-story, brick building with a freshly installed DaVinci Singlewidth Shake Roof Tiles in Late Fall. The dwelling has an enclosed brick entryway, as well as tan trim, gutters, and garage door, an impressive bay window, and copper gable returns, all installed by Roof Rite.

IMG_3659.jpg.alt: A one-story, brick building with a freshly installed DaVinci Singlewidth Shake Roof Tiles installed by Roof Rite in Late Fall. The dwelling has an enclosed brick entryway, as well as tan trim and gutters, an impressive bay window, and copper gable returns, all installed by Roof Rite.

IMG_6268.png.alt: A rooftop photo of Roof Rite installing a DaVinci Singlewidth slate roof tile on a large, L-shaped roof. Workers are tied off, using toe kicks to move around and stage materials.

IMG_7189 2.png.alt: Roof Rite crews installing snow guards on a DaVinci singlewidth slate tile roof

IMG_7252.jpeg.alt: An after photo of a one-story, white-painted-brick house with a freshly installed DaVinci singlewidth slate tile roof. The photo is taken from the ground overviewing a paved, back patio area, complete with tables, chairs, and a grill.
